# Incursa Integrations ElectronicNotary

Independent electronic notary integration repository for Incursa applications.

Primary solution: `Incursa.Integrations.ElectronicNotary.slnx`.

## Packages

- `Incursa.Integrations.ElectronicNotary.Abstractions`
- `Incursa.Integrations.ElectronicNotary`
- `Incursa.Integrations.ElectronicNotary.Proof`
- `Incursa.Integrations.ElectronicNotary.Proof.AspNetCore`

## Commands

- Restore: `dotnet restore Incursa.Integrations.ElectronicNotary.slnx`
- Build: `dotnet build Incursa.Integrations.ElectronicNotary.slnx -c Release`
- Test: `dotnet test --solution Incursa.Integrations.ElectronicNotary.slnx -c Release`
- Pack: `pwsh -File scripts/pack.ps1`

## Scope Governance

Boundary policy: `docs/quality/repo-scope-boundary.md`.
